---
name: New provider
about: Request or offer to add docs for a provider we don't cover yet
title: "New provider: [PROVIDER NAME]"
labels: new-provider, help wanted
---

## Provider

**Name:**
**Website:**
**API docs (if available):**

## What data does it offer?

- [ ] Match events (pass-by-pass, shot-by-shot)
- [ ] Match stats (aggregated per match)
- [ ] Season stats (aggregated per season)
- [ ] Player data
- [ ] xG / advanced metrics
- [ ] Tracking data (player positions)
- [ ] Other:

## Access method

- [ ] Free API (no key)
- [ ] Free API (key required)
- [ ] Paid API
- [ ] Web scraping
- [ ] File download
- [ ] Other:

## Are you offering to write the docs?

- [ ] Yes, I'll create a PR (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for how)
- [ ] No, just requesting that someone else adds this

## Documentation sources (for crawling)

Help us find the best docs to crawl. Check all that apply:

- [ ] Has `llms.txt` / `llms-full.txt` at site root (check `{site}/llms.txt`)
- [ ] ReadTheDocs site: `URL`
- [ ] GitHub repo with docs/ folder: `URL`
- [ ] API documentation site: `URL`
- [ ] Other reference material:

## Package info (for version tracking)

- [ ] PyPI: package name
- [ ] npm: package name
- [ ] GitHub release: owner/repo
- [ ] N/A (no versioned package)
